reason: All 36 matrix section 2 backward-table tc_ids appear in YAML tests blocks with exact 1:1 mapping (0 missing, 0 extra). Per-FR tc_count claims reconcile to actual entry counts (FR-01=7, FR-02=13, FR-03=8, NFR-01=1, NFR-02=2, NFR-03=5; sum=36). Per-layer counts reconcile (unit=25, integration=10, benchmark=1; sum=36). metadata.total_test_cases=36 matches by_fr sum and by_layer sum and enumerated tc_id count. All 36 tc_ids follow naming convention test_<frNN|nfrNN>_<descriptive>. All 30 SRS ACs are referenced across ac_ids + cross_ref_ac_ids fields; AC-FR-03.3.a has no dedicated tc_id but is covered parametrically per matrix section 1.3 line 320 (every happy-path subcommand test asserts result.returncode == 0) — this matches matrix's own test-coverage model and is not a YAML invention. Cross-cutting binding via cross_ref_ac_ids preserves full AC coverage without inflating tc count.
